title: AI Safe Authoring Profile v1
description: Per-agent capability and constraint profile for CHAT_DIRECTOR authoring sessions, including identity, structural limits, invariant bands, metric targets, and session policy.

profileId.description: Stable identifier for this authoring profile.

version.description: Semantic version of the profile contract, e.g. 1.0.0.

description.description: Human-readable summary of the profile's purpose and scope.

agentSelector.description: Criteria used by CHAT_DIRECTOR to bind runtime agents or templates to this profile.

agentKinds.description: Logical agent kinds or roles (e.g., chat, editor, orchestrator).

templateIds.description: AI-chat template IDs that should use this profile.

tiers.description: Allowed constellation tiers for this profile (e.g., T1-core, T2-vault, T3-lab).

repos.description: Canonical repo identifiers this profile may target.

capabilities.description: Feature-level capabilities for this agent profile.

allowedObjectKinds.description: Contract families and artifact kinds this profile may author.

allowedDocTypes.description: Markdown doc contract types this profile may emit (e.g., guide-v1, spec-v1, workplan-v1).

allowsClamp.description: If true, this agent may tighten invariant/metric bands within the spine-defined ranges.

allowsSchemaUpgrade.description: If true, this agent may propose schema version upgrades or new schema families.

mayAddFields.description: If false, agent responses must not introduce any new JSON fields beyond those present in skeletons or existing artifacts.

mayTouchDeadLedger.description: If true, this agent may write or update fields that reference Dead-Ledger surfaces.

limits.description: Hard structural and volume limits enforced per request/response.

maxArtifactsPerResponse.description: Maximum number of artifacts the agent may emit in a single response.

maxSchemaRefsPerRequest.description: Maximum number of distinct schemaRef values allowed in one ai-authoring-request.

maxNestedObjectDepth.description: Maximum allowed JSON nesting depth in generated artifacts.

maxLinesPerArtifact.description: Soft cap on approximate line count per artifact. Used for CI and guidance.

invariantBands.description: Profile-level caps and floors for invariants, usually a subset of the spine ranges.

metricTargets.description: Target bands and hard constraints for entertainment metrics, optionally per objectKind.

global.description: Profile-wide metric bands that apply to all artifacts unless overridden.

byObjectKind.description: Optional overrides per objectKind (e.g., moodContract, eventContract).

planPolicy.description: Rules governing the PLAN phase and plan→body coupling.

requireInvariantBands.description: If true, plans must declare invariant bands before any body is accepted.

requireMetricBands.description: If true, plans must declare metric target bands before any body is accepted.

minPlanRefs.description: Minimum number of referenced IDs (regions, seeds, moods, personas) required in a plan.

enforceNoEscalationBeyondPlan.description: If true, final artifacts may not widen invariant/metric bands beyond those declared in the accepted plan.

maxArtifactsPerSession.description: Maximum number of artifacts this profile may author in a single logical session.

maxFailedPlansPerSession.description: Maximum number of rejected plans allowed before the session must be terminated or escalated.

allowedStates.description: Set of allowed session state labels for this profile (e.g., DISCOVERY, PLAN_PENDING, PLAN_CONFIRMED, BODY_AUTHORED, CI_PENDING, COMPLETE, FAILED).

researchFlags.description: Optional flags for experimental or research-only profiles.

isResearchProfile.description: If true, this profile is intended for Tier-3 research or lab repos only.

requiresManualApproval.description: If true, artifacts created under this profile require human approval before apply.

band.description: Numeric band constraint for an invariant or metric.
